# QA Plan: Sprint 41 — Polish Hardening + Release-Readiness Pre-Flight (Polish Exit)

**Date:** 2026-06-20  
**Generated by:** team-qa + sprint-plan + c-sharp-devops-engineer (for QA harness) + csharpexpert + verification-before-completion (S41-02 per sprint plan)  
**Scope:** Must-have S41-01–S41-06 + should S41-07–S41-08 per sprint plan (Horizon 3 polish hardening + pre-flight); AAR/replay + determinism sweep + evidence consolidation focus per roadmap.  
**Engine:** Unity 6.3 LTS / .NET 8 headless; PlayMode proxies in `ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests`; harness via BalticReplayHarness + PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests.  
**Sprint file:** `production/sprints/sprint-41-polish-hardening-release-preflight.md`  
**Kickoff:** `production/agentic/sprint-41-parallel-kickoff-2026-06-20.md`  
**Trunk:** `main` @ `c4d6e52` (post S40 + S41-01 baseline)  
**Review mode:** Lean (per `production/review-mode.txt` — PR-SPRINT skipped; parallel domain agents; read-only/docs focus)  
**Authority:** `production/polish-scope-boundary-2026-06-19.md` + [`docs/reports/future-sprint-roadpmap.md`](../../docs/reports/future-sprint-roadpmap.md) §Horizon 3 (S41). **Track A in-boundary only.** S42 dispatch blocked until S41 closeout + scope packet.

**Scope compliance (enforced):** Strictly inside polish-scope-boundary-2026-06-19.md (Baltic vertical slice + C2 18/18 + Platform Editor C–H polish only + replay maint + P0/P1 perf + determinism/evidence/ADR read-only + gap analysis; NO production refactor code, NO launch artifacts, NO src changes beyond isolated test fixtures if any; extend-only CatalogWriteGate; ZERO DelegationBridge.cs; production Baltic hash `17144800277401907079` immutable; ReplayGolden 6/6; headless primary; lean evidence). Every story/artifact cites boundary + roadmap §Horizon 3 + sprint-41 plan. **S41-02 (this plan) blocks all waves (S41-03+).** Test baseline ≥1226 (post S41-01); closeout target ≥1226 (no regression). GitNexus re-index mandatory in S41-04. Determinism/replay gates per S41-04 audit (0 issues). Evidence-Pack-QA + Evidence consolidation in S41-05.

**S41-01 baseline reference (completed):** `production/qa/smoke-sprint-41-baseline-2026-06-20.md` — **PASS** (1226/1226 tests; ReplayGolden 6/6; C2 proxy 18/18; Baltic hash unchanged; GitNexus status noted for S41-04 reindex).

## Hard Gates (Closeout — mandatory every merge + exit)

- `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln` — **≥1226** (post S41-01 baseline; no regression)
- ReplayGolden **6/6** (engage, comms, classify, stale, spoof, readiness + isolated fixtures); intra-run A/B hash/fingerprint match
- C2 headless proxy **18/18+** (`PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests` incl. Graph* filters; filters: PlayModeSmoke|C2Selection|OobTree|LossesScoring|BalticReplay|FuelState|AttackMenu|PlatformImport|Doctrine|C2TopBar|PlatformCatalogViewer|PlatformComms|PlatformLinkCatalog|Graph*)
- Production Baltic world hash **`17144800277401907079`** immutable (except isolated golden fixture updates)
- GitNexus **up-to-date @ HEAD** (S41-04 re-index via `node .gitnexus/run.cjs analyze`; `impact()` / `detect_changes()` discipline for any reads)
- **ZERO touch** `DelegationBridge.cs`; **extend-only** `CatalogWriteGate`
- All S41 artifacts cite `polish-scope-boundary-2026-06-19.md` + `docs/reports/future-sprint-roadpmap.md` §Horizon 3 + sprint-41 plan
- S41-02 plan + smoke closeout PASS required before S41-03+ waves
- **Scope-expansion decision packet** ready in `production/gate-checks/` (blocks S42)
- Determinism audit (S41-04) reports **0 CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM** (per 2026-06-20 audit)
- Evidence-Pack-QA: consolidated index + AAR/replay + playtest 11 refs present

**Verification-before-completion pattern (embedded):** Pre-merge: GitNexus context/query on touched symbols; replay-verify; smoke-check skill; test-evidence-review; story-readiness (for process stories); boundary citation check.

## Automated Tests Required (C# / .NET Harness Focus — c-sharp-devops-engineer + csharpexpert)

### S41-01 (baseline; already executed)
- Full sln + targeted: `ReplayGoldenSuiteTests`, `PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests`
- GitNexus index health (status post-deferral)
- Evidence: `production/qa/smoke-sprint-41-baseline-2026-06-20.md`

### S41-04 Determinism + Replay (core sweep; AAR/replay focus)
**Test file paths / harness (per prior + skills):**
- `tests/regression/replay-golden-*.txt` (isolated only)
- `src/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests/...` + `ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests/...` (ReplayGolden, DeterministicDetectionLoopTests, etc.)
- `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/...` (PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests + BalticReplayHarness filters)
- Replay harness: `BalticReplayHarness.Run` (dotnet test --filter ~ReplayGolden)
- Determinism-audit skill scan paths: `ProjectAegis.Sim/{Core,Sensors,Engage,Policy,Scenario,Time,Glossary,Catalog,Logistics}` + `ProjectAegis.Delegation/{Core,Decision,Controllers,Orchestration,Policy,Sim,Projection,Replay}` (Hindsight exempt per AGENTS.md)

**What to test (csharpexpert patterns — test-driven verification):**
- Seeded RNG only (`SeededRng`); A vs B match across fresh processes + vs golden (world hash + FINGERPRINT_SHA256 + order-log diffs)
- No wall-clock (`DateTime.Now`/UtcNow) in sim tick/Decision/Telemetry hot paths (presentation + ICatalogClock only)
- No unordered Dictionary/HashSet iteration or LINQ OrderBy-less in deterministic paths
- Pure functions of (observed state, traits, seed); order-log + checkpoint exports only for AAR (read-only)
- `/replay-verify` skill on any fixture delta (A/B + golden match)
- GitNexus queries for RNG/tick pipeline/determinism symbols (e.g. `gitnexus__query` "tick pipeline simulation core deterministic order", "RNG SeededRng random seed determinism")
- AAR linkage: order-log projections feed `hindsight-aar-analyst` (aar-{scenario}-{runId} banks) without mutating replay fingerprint (per Game-Requirements/requirements/07-Agentic-Infrastructure.md + 17-Replay-AAR-And-Order-Log.md)

**Edge cases:**
- Seed variations (42, 11, 7, 4242) across Baltic variants + delegation RNG
- Fixture-only changes (no prod hash bump)
- Cross-process reproducibility

**Evidence requirements:** Determinism-audit-2026-06-20.md update; replay reports; GitNexus status post-analyze.

### S41-03 / S41-07 / S41-08 (read-only analysis)
- GitNexus `context()` / `query()` / `impact()` / cohesion reports for Decision/Telemetry/Osint + tracker rows
- No runtime tests; doc + index verification only

### S41-05 / S41-06 (consolidation / closeout)
- Cross-ref all prior smoke/proxy/replay/perf reports + harness runs
- No new code; consolidation + index verification (test-evidence-review pattern)

**C# test structure recommendations (csharpexpert + superpowers test-driven):**
- `[Test]` / `[UnityTest]` for PlayMode (NUnit + Unity Test Framework)
- Seeded harness setup: `new SeededRng(seed); BalticReplayHarness.Run(scenario, seed, ticks)`
- Asserts: worldHash == golden; orderLog.Diff(A, B) == empty; fingerprint match
- Fixtures isolated to `tests/regression/`
- Harness verification before manual: smoke-check skill + PlayMode filters
- Superpowers: align with production/superpowers-version.txt + docs/engineering/superpowers-setup.md for agentic test orchestration (e.g. dispatching-parallel-agents harness examples)
